## What's Changed
* chore: release tooling + Obsidian community review feedback by @momadacoding in https://github.com/acornyio/acorny-obsidian/pull/3
* chore(release): auto-publish releases, build provenance, and Obsidian review fixes by @momadacoding in https://github.com/acornyio/acorny-obsidian/pull/4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of Acorny Sync.

Sync your Acorny highlights into your Obsidian vault as Markdown notes — one note per source, idempotent append (your edits are preserved), with manual / on-startup / interval triggers.
